title: only last image filters takes effect when list images with buildah
body:
1. `buildah image --filter a --filter b --log-level trace`
from trace, only b filter takes effect, not expected result `a && b`
[ref code](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/cbaf84eaf3a07ed211820c50c17c8d13c322ed55/cmd/buildah/images.go#L59)

2. podman has correct activities: `podman image --filter a --filter b --log-level trace` will filter with `a && b`
[ref code](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8f3fb743ee57964594b36fdffb7b8fc5e3ca3371/pkg/domain/entities/images.go#L249)
